plugins.name: ai-daily-report
plugins.description: AI 日报生成器 — 采集 GitHub/AI 新闻/排行榜/大佬观点，生成带朗读功能的中文 HTML 日报

plugins.name: auto-git-commit
plugins.description: 每次会话结束时自动检测文件变更，AI 归纳 commit message 并 commit + push

plugins.name: web-claude-chat
plugins.description: Claude Code 浏览器聊天界面：移动端响应式适配、QR码扫码访问、Markdown/Mermaid 渲染、Todo 追踪、Token 安全认证、CLI↔Web 会话桥接、Windows 防火墙自动管理、实时跨设备同步

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Structured AI-assisted development workflow — from project discovery to verification. Six commands guide you through requirements, design, implementation, and testing with full-chain numbered tracking.
